title: Which is not an example of an intangible asset?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Which is not an example of an intangible asset?


A patent
A computer
A copyright
A trademark

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Which of the following statements about capital structure are correct? Select ALL correct answers.


A company needs to consider the current economic climate when making decisions on debt and equity proportions.
Having too much equity may dilute earnings and the value of the original investors.
A company should always finance its business using as much debt as possible in order to optimize the capital structure.
Having too little debt may increase the risk of default in repayment

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
A company needs to consider the current economic climate when making decisions on debt and equity proportions.
Having too much equity may dilute earnings and the value of the original investors.
Having too little debt may increase the risk of default in repayment.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Which of the following are examples of institutional investors? Select ALL correct answers.

Mutual funds
High net worth individuals
Companies that are publicly traded on stock exchanges
Private equity firms

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Mutual funds
Companies that are publicly traded on stock exchanges
Private equity firms

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
What does a diagram of a perfectly positive correlation look like?

A curved line that slopes from the bottom left to the top right quardrant
A perfectly straight line that slopes from the top left to the bottom right quardrant
A perfectly straight line that slopes from the bottom left to the top right quardrant
A scatter plot that have dots all over the place

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: A perfectly straight line that slopes from the bottom left to the top right quadrant.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Which of the following items are not included in working capital?


Accounts payable
Inventory
Accounts receivable
Short term investments

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:

turns.speaker: assistant

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Which ratio is not one of the three ratios that multiply together to produce the return on equity ratio?


Net profit margin
Financial leverage
Total asset turnover
Operating profit margin

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
When performing a vertical analysis which income statement item do you use to determine the cost contribution for each expense category? (What is the denominator?)


Gross profit
Operating expenses
Net income
Sales
